problem.title: Two Sum III
problem.description: Design and implement a TwoSum class. It should support the following operations: add and find.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – HashMap
solutions.description: A hash map stores each added number along with its occurrence count, enabling O(1) add operations. For find, iterating over stored keys and checking whether the complement (value − num) exists handles both the case where two distinct numbers sum to the target and the special case where a number is used twice (requires count ≥ 2). The key insight is that tracking counts rather than just presence handles duplicate numbers correctly.

complexity.time: O(n) for find, O(1) for add
